episodes.title: Quantum Machine Learning with Dr. Maria Schuld
episodes.guestTitle: Senior Research Scientist at Xanadu, QML Pioneer
episodes.summary: Dr. Maria Schuld discusses the current state of quantum machine learning, the challenges of near-term quantum devices, and the future of QML research.
keyInsights: Quantum kernels can provide advantage on specific problems
Data encoding is a critical challenge
Hybrid quantum-classical models are the near-term path
Open-source frameworks like PennyLane are accelerating research

episodes.title: Multi-Agent AI Systems with Dr. Yoav Shoham
episodes.guestTitle: Professor Emeritus at Stanford, Co-founder of AI21 Labs
episodes.summary: Dr. Yoav Shoham discusses the evolution of multi-agent systems, the challenges of scaling AI, and building responsible AI.
keyInsights: Multi-agent systems will be the next frontier
